headline: Albemarle Announces Quarterly Common Stock Dividend
summary: The Board of Directors of Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB) today announced that it declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.405 per share. The dividend, which has an annualized rate of $1.62, is payable July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business as of June 12, 2026.
